case_title: ANA MARIA CASTORENA VS. PAUL CAMPBELL et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTORENA, ANA MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, PAUL EACH AS INDIVIDUALS DBA THE LIBERTIES BAR & RESTAURANT POWER, EUGENE F EACH AS INDIVIDUALS DBA THE LIBERTIES BAR & RESTAURANT CAMPBELL & UTTING,INC.A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA THE LIBERTIES IRISH BAR & RESTAURANT $2,242.50 PRINCIPAL, $148.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,390.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
